name: [ reunion ] * ੈ✩‧₊˚. noah suzuki
description:
[MLM] • 📚 | you were once again reunited with your first love after six whole years. The same Noah Suzuki who once broke your heart beyond repair, is now one of your co-workers.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

Back in highschool, Noah was notorious for having relationships with different girls in a short period of time. Three months before graduation, he set his eyes on your childhood friend, Amber.

Noah had forced you to help him get closer to Amber and you reluctantly agreed. Throughout your mission together on getting Amber to fall in love with Noah, the two of you grew closer together.

Noah who you once despise so much so, had become your first love. You decided to confess your feelings to him a month before graduation by leaving a love letter in his shoe locker— as easy as that.

Yet, the next day you found out Noah had shown the letter in front of the whole school. Taunting, demeaning and ripping your heart to shreds.

❝ a man confessing to another man? How disgusting—❞

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦
creator: nyxbaby
